title: AN ACT SEPARATING THE DANAO NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL ГўВЂВ” MAGTANGTANG ANNEX IN BARANGAY MAGTANGTANG, MUNICIPALITY OF DANAO, PROVINCE OF BOHOL FROM THE DANAO NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL, CONVERTING IT INTO AN INDEPENDENT NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL TO BE KNOWN AS FRANCISCO DAGOHOY MEMORIAL HIGH SCHOOL AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

chunks.text:
H. No. 5370; 106 OG No. 22, 3082 (May 31, 2010)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 10037, March 18, 2010 ]

AN ACT SEPARATING THE DANAO NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL ГўВЂВ” MAGTANGTANG ANNEX IN BARANGAY MAGTANGTANG, MUNICIPALITY OF DANAO, PROVINCE OF BOHOL FROM THE DANAO NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL, CONVERTING IT INTO AN INDEPENDENT NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL TO BE KNOWN AS FRANCISCO DAGOHOY MEMORIAL HIGH SCHOOL AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1.

Separation and Conversion Into a National High School.

ГўВЂВ” The Danao National High School ГўВЂВ” Magtangtang Annex in Barangay Magtangtang, Municipality of Danao, Province of Bohol is hereby separated from the Danao National High School and converted into an independent national high school to be known as Francisco Dagohoy Memorial High School.

SEC. 2.

Transfer of Assets and Liabilities.

ГўВЂВ” All personnel, assets, liabilities and records of the Danao National High School ГўВЂВ” Magtangtang Annex are hereby transferred to and absorbed by the Francisco Dagohoy Memorial High School.

SEC. 3.

Appropriations.

ГўВЂВ” The Secretary of Education shall immediately include in the Department's program the operationalization of the Francisco Dagohoy Memorial High School, the initial funding of which shall be charged against the current year's appropriations of the Danao National High School ГўВЂВ” Magtangtang Annex. Thereafter, the amount necessary for the continued operation of the school shall be included in the annual General Appropriations Act.

SEC, 4.

Implementation.

ГўВЂВ” The Secretary of Education shall issue rules and regulations that may be necessary to carry out the purpose of this Act.

SEC 5.

Effectivity.

ГўВЂВ” This Act shall take effect fifteen (15) days after its publication in the

Official Gazette

.

Approved,

(Sgd.) JUAN PONCE ENRILE

(Sgd.) PROSPERO C. NOGRALES

President of Senate

Speaker of the House of Representatives

This Act which originated in the House of Representatives was finally passed by the House of Representatives and the Senate on December 3, 2008 and December 16, 2009, respectively.

(Sgd.) EMMA LIRIO-REYES

(Sgd.) MARILYN B. BARUA-YAP

Secretary of Senate

Secretary General House of Representatives

Approved: MAR 18 2010

(Sgd.) EMMA LIRIO-REYES

(Sgd.) MARILYN B. BARUA-YAP

Secretary of Senate

Secretary General House of Representatives

Approved: MAR 18 2010

(Sgd.) GLORIA MACAPAGAL - ARROYO

President of the Philippines
